## What you reviewed

- [ ] `src/manifest.json` permissions
- [ ] `src/lib/api.ts` and handlers under `src/lib/bridge/handlers/`

## Sensitive data

Do **not** paste bearer tokens, pairing codes, or Steam session secrets. Use redacted examples only.

## Disclosure

For undisclosed vulnerabilities, email **security@skinalyze.app** (see [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) in the repository root) instead of opening a public issue.
